code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of Triple objects into a single fluent sentence.
    """
    def clause(t: Triple) -> str:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
        # Simple handcrafted mappings for natural‑language rendering
        mapping = {
            "country": f"{s} is located in {o}",
            "foundingDate": f"{s} was founded on {o}",
            "industry": f"{s} operates in the {o}",
            "city": f"{s} is based in {o}",
            "netIncome": f"{s} has a net income of {o}",
            "operatingIncome": f"{s} has an operating income of {o}",
            "regionServed": f"{s} serves the region {o}",
            "areaTotal": f"{s} covers an area of {o}",
            "leader": f"The leader of {s} is {o}",
            "leaderTitle": f"The leader of {s} holds the title {o}",
            "populationDensity": f"{s} has a population density of {o}",
            "foundationPlace": f"{s} was founded at {o}",
            "numberOfEmployees": f"{s} employs {o} people",
            "numberOfLocations": f"{s} has {o} locations",
            "service": f"{s} provides {o}",
            "type": f"{s} is a {o}",
            "alternativeName": f"{s} is also known as {o}",
            "birthDate": f"{s} was born on {o}",
            "keyPerson": f"{s} has key person {o}",
            "cost": f"The cost of {s} is {o}",
            "location": f"{s} is located in {o}",
            "product": f"{s} produces {o}",
            "subsidiary": f"{s} has subsidiary {o}",
            "timeZone": f"{s} is in the {o}",
            "isPartOf": f"{s} is part of {o}",
            "parentCompany": f"{s} is owned by {o}",
            "capital": f"The capital of {s} is {o}",
            "motto": f"The motto of {s} is \"{o}\"",
            "officialLanguage": f"The official language of {s} is {o}",
            "leaderParty": f"The leader of {s} belongs to {o}",
            "areaUrban": f"{s} has an urban area of {o}",
            "part": f"{s} includes {o}",
            "revenue": f"{s} has revenue of {o}",
            "ethnicGroup": f"{s} includes ethnic group {o}",
            "governmentType": f"{s} has a government type of {o}",
            "percentageOfAreaWater": f"{o}% of {s}'s area is water",
            "longName": f"The long name of {s} is {o}",
            "populationTotal": f"{s} has a total population of {o}",
            "language": f"The language of {s} is {o}",
            "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} meters above sea level",
        }
        return mapping.get(p, f"{s} {p} {o}")

    # Build clauses for all triples
    clauses = [clause(t) for t in triples]

    # Join clauses into a single sentence
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0]
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1]

    # Ensure the sentence starts with a capital letter and ends with a period
    sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
    if not sentence.endswith('.'):
        sentence += '.'
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
